description: You can execute these commands from the CLI, as part of an automation, or in a playbook.

outputs.description: The score of the IP Range CrowdSec.Info.ip The IP address
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.ip_range_score

outputs.description: The IP range CrowdSec.Info.as_name The AS name
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.ip_range

outputs.description: The AS number CrowdSec.Info.location.country The country of the IP
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.as_num

outputs.description: The city of the IP CrowdSec.Info.location.latitude The latitude of the IP
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.location.city

outputs.description: The longitude of the IP CrowdSec.Info.reverse_dns The reverse DNS of the IP
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.location.longitude

outputs.description: List of IP behaviors CrowdSec.Info.history.first_seen Date
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.behaviors

outputs.description: CrowdSec.Info.history.last_seen Date Date of the last time this IP was reported
outputs.name: Date of the first time this IP was reported

outputs.description: Delta in days between first seen and today CrowdSec.Info.history.days_age Delta in days between first and last seen timestamps
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.history.full_age

outputs.description: A list of categories associated with the IP. Those data can be sourced from 3rd parties (i.e. tor exit nodes list) CrowdSec.Info.classifications.false_positives A list of false positives tags associated with the IP. Any IP with false_positives tags shouldn't be considered as malicious
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.classifications.classifications

outputs.description: CrowdSec.Info.attack_details A more exhaustive list of the scenarios for which a given IP was reported CrowdSec.Info.target_countries
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.classifications.classifications.description

outputs.description: The top 10 reports repartition by country about the IP, as a percentage CrowdSec.Info.scores.overall.aggressiveness Overall aggressiveness score
outputs.name: Object

outputs.description: Overall threat score CrowdSec.Info.scores.overall.trust Overall trust score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.overall.threat

outputs.description: Overall anomaly score CrowdSec.Info.scores.overall.total Overall score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.overall.anomaly

outputs.description: Last day aggressiveness score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_day.threat Last day threat score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_day.aggressiveness

outputs.description: Last day trust score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_day.anomaly Last day anomaly score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_day.trust

outputs.description: Last day score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_week.aggressiveness Last week aggressiveness score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_day.total

outputs.description: Last week threat score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_week.trust Last week trust score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_week.threat

outputs.description: Last week anomaly score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_week.total Last week score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_week.anomaly

outputs.description: Last month aggressiveness score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_month.threat Last month threat score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_month.aggressiveness

outputs.description: Last month trust score CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_month.anomaly Last month anomaly score
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_month.trust

outputs.description: Last month score IP.Address The IP Address
outputs.name: CrowdSec.Info.scores.last_month.total

outputs.description: The actual score. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The indicator type. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
